trans-unit.source: You must assign all quantity in order to post. Quantity is %1. Qty. to Assign is %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit IT4G-Charge Assigment - NamedType QtyNotAssignedErr

trans-unit.source: Related item ledger entries cannot be found.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit IT4G-Charge Assigment - NamedType RelatedItemLedgEntriesNotFoundErr

trans-unit.source: Receipt lines have been deleted.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit IT4G-Charge Assigment - Method PostItemChargePerRcpt - NamedType ReceiptLinesDeletedErr

trans-unit.source: IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData MarkId field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control myData MarkId - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData Transaction Errors field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control myData Transaction Errors - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the No. Series field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control No. Series - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the posting date for this document.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Posting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipment Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipment Method Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Shipment Reason field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipment Reason RCGRBASE - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipping Agent Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipping Agent Service Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Transfer Reason field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer Reason RCGRBASE - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the location that items are transferred from.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-from Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the sender at the location that the items are transferred from.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-from Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the location that the items are transferred to.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-to Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the recipient at the location that the items are transferred to.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-to Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Send Electronic Invoice Manually
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Action Send Electronic Invoice Manually - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: IT4G - Temp Customer Order Header
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Temp Cust. Order Header - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Check
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Temp Cust. Order Header - Action Check - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: IT4G Get Transfer Boxes
trans-unit.note: PageExtension IT4G-Posted LS TR Ship - Action GetBoxes - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: IT4G-Missmatched Cust. Documents
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Missmatched Cust. Docs - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Find Mismatched Documents
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Missmatched Cust. Docs - Action FindMismachDocument - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: IT4G Get Transfer Boxes
trans-unit.note: PageExtension IT4G-Transfer Shipment - Action GetBoxes - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Date field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the Post Infocode.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Document No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Document No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Gen. Bus. Posting Group - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Gross Amount field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Gross Amount - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData MarkId field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control myData MarkId - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData Transaction Errors field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control myData Transaction Errors - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData Uid field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control myData Uid - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Net Amount field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Net Amount - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the POS Terminal No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control POS Terminal No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Post Infocode field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Post Infocode - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Post Series field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Post Series - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Posting Status field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Posting Status - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Store No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Store No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Transaction No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control Transaction No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the VAT Amount field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control VAT Amount - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the VAT Bus.Posting Group field.
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Control VAT Bus.Posting Group - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Send Electronic Invoice Manually
trans-unit.note: Page BSB-Trans. AADE for Correction - Action Send Electronic Invoice Manually - Property Caption
